text: Biological plausibility of this KER lies in the fact that reactive species, in excess, react and change macromolecules such as proteins, nucleic acids and lipids. Membrane lipids are particularly susceptible to damage by free radicals, as they are composed by unsaturated fatty acids (Su et al. 2019). Hence, increase in ROS production beyond antioxidant system defense capability of cells enables free circulation of molecules such as O2·−, HO·, H2O2, which removes electrons from membrane lipids and then triggers lipid peroxidation (Auten and Davis 2009; Su et al. 2019).
